name: codex-cue
description: Route Codex questions and completed-task follow-ups to a lightweight Windows wizard.

interface.shortDescription: Open questions and next-step choices in the wizard.
interface.longDescription: Routes questions and completion follow-ups through lifecycle hooks to ask_options and a native WPF wizard using direct MCP JSON text.
defaultPrompt: Ask me a clickable option question.
Offer clickable next tasks when the work is complete.
